subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God and my Beloved! Thou dost witness and behold how the dogs of Thy creation have gathered against us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی و محبوبی تشهد و تری کیف اجتمعوا علینا کلاب خلقک و
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
